## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Augment Code's organic growth strategy and prioritize next steps for the GrowthX team.](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on backlink acquisition and Reddit engagement to boost organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Develop a template store for Augie CLI to drive user-generated content and engagement](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
  - [Need to fix Google Analytics tracking to better measure funnel performance](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1957.0)
  - [Aim for significant organic traffic growth by December, potentially overtaking paid channels](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Performance

  - [60 articles published, with 30 new pieces per week](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [Focus on comparisons and listicles showing early success](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [300 new clicks last week, with top performers mentioning Cursor](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Early signs are positive, but impact on overall traffic not yet significant](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [Agreed to invest in paid backlinks to boost rankings](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1739.0)
  - [Target keywords like "AI coding" where Augment can compete](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
  - [Aim to get content to first page of search results](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [Estimated 2-3 months before seeing significant needle movement](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)

### Augie CLI Template Store

  - [New initiative to create a template store for Augie CLI](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [Will allow users to submit and share prompts/templates](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [Opportunity for user-generated content and community engagement](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [Potential to target adjacent search intents and drive organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)

### Reddit Engagement

  - [Plan to seed discussions and monitor Reddit for relevant topics](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
  - [Create multiple accounts to initiate and nurture conversations](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
  - [Goal is to increase mentions of Augment organically on the platform](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)

### Analytics and Tracking

  - [Current Google Analytics setup not effectively tracking funnel performance](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1959.0)
  - [Need to either fix GA event tracking or provide access to internal dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1979.0)
  - [Important for measuring impact of organic traffic on sign-ups and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement backlink acquisition strategy, tracking cost and quality metrics](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1739.0)
  - [Develop and execute Reddit engagement plan, measuring mentions over time](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
  - [Work with product team to determine launch timeline for Augie CLI templating feature](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Investigate and fix Google Analytics tracking issues for better funnel visibility](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1979.0)
  - [Continue producing 30 articles per week, focusing on high-performing formats](https://fathom.video/share/GbKQAfyqgM9MYyYvejwtm7zNDZEpmNJk?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
